Class ValidationUtil

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.util.ValidationUtil
public class ValidationUtil extends Object
A compatibility layer containing methods used when performing validation. Any code that must be different in Java vs. TS/JS *and* related to validation should go in here. There is a ValidationUtil.ts file that contains the TS/JS specific implementation of this class.
Author:
eric.wittmann@gmail.com
